seo.title: Sunrise Clinic — Quality Healthcare in Mumbai
seo.description: Sunrise Multi-Speciality Clinic offers expert medical care across general medicine, dermatology, and orthopaedics in Andheri, Mumbai.

contact.address: Shop 4, Sunrise Complex, Lokhandwala Road, Andheri West, Mumbai 400 053

hero.headline: Compassionate Care, Expert Treatment
hero.subheadline: Over 15 years of trusted healthcare in the heart of Mumbai. Walk in or book an appointment online.

about.title: About Sunrise Clinic
about.body: Founded in 2009 by Dr. Priya Mehta, Sunrise Clinic has grown into a trusted multi-speciality practice serving over 20,000 patients across Mumbai. We combine modern diagnostics with a patient-first approach to ensure every visit is as comfortable as it is effective.

items.name: General Medicine
items.description: Comprehensive check-ups, fever management, chronic disease monitoring, and preventive care for all ages.

items.name: Dermatology
items.description: Skin, hair, and nail consultations. Expert treatment for acne, eczema, psoriasis, and cosmetic concerns.

items.name: Orthopaedics
items.description: Joint pain, sports injuries, fracture management, and physiotherapy referrals.

items.name: Paediatrics
items.description: Well-baby visits, vaccinations, growth monitoring, and illness management for children 0–18 years.

items.name: In-Clinic Diagnostics
items.description: On-site blood work, ECG, and urine analysis. Results in 2–4 hours.

items.name: Annual Health Packages
items.description: Preventive health screening packages covering 30+ tests with a complimentary doctor review.

members.name: Dr. Priya Mehta
members.bio: MBBS, MD (Internal Medicine), AIIMS Delhi. 15+ years of experience in general and preventive medicine.

members.name: Dr. Arjun Nair
members.bio: MBBS, DVD, Bombay Hospital. Specialises in medical and cosmetic dermatology.

members.name: Dr. Shalini Rao
members.bio: MBBS, MD (Paediatrics), KEM Hospital. Caring for Mumbai's children for over a decade.

items.name: Aisha K.
items.text: Dr. Mehta took the time to really listen. Diagnosed my thyroid issue after months of other doctors missing it. Highly recommend.

items.name: Rohan P.
items.text: Brought my 3-year-old son to Dr. Rao. She was so patient and gentle. The clinic is spotless and the staff are warm.

items.name: Sunita M.
items.text: Annual health package was great value — 30+ tests and a thorough review in one morning. No waiting around.

items.a: Walk-ins are welcome, but booking ahead guarantees your preferred time slot and reduces waiting.

items.q: Which insurance panels do you accept?
items.a: We accept Star Health, HDFC ERGO, Mediassist, and CGHS. Please carry your insurance card.

items.q: How long do diagnostic results take?
items.a: Most routine tests are ready within 2–4 hours. Culture reports take 24–48 hours.
Yes — two-hour free parking is available in the Sunrise Complex basement. Enter from the side lane.
